demographics.living_situation: currently travelling interstate, staying overnight in a hotel with their spouse

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I left my epilepsy medication at home, I'm due to take it right now, and if I miss it I will definitely have a massive seizure tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Arrived at a hotel interstate tonight and realised the whole supply of daily epilepsy tablets was left at home. Needs a way to get the dose tonight and is terrified about missing it.

symptom_narrative.onset: realised this evening on arriving at the hotel that all the epilepsy tablets had been left at home in another state
symptom_narrative.duration: the evening dose is due right now and there is no supply on hand
symptom_narrative.character: no seizure or twitching happening at the moment — says they feel like their normal self, just extremely frightened about what could happen without the tablet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: very high anxiety, pacing the room and searching through luggage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the fear is building the closer it gets to the overdue dose time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet — they cannot find any tablets
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the longer they go without the dose the more frightened they feel
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: says that once before, when a dose was missed, they had a huge seizure that would not stop and ended up needing hospital care
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: independent and fully able to function, but currently very agitated and distressed

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: severe epilepsy that has been hard to control for years
past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a daily seizure tablet (sodium valproate) morning and night

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one tablet twice a day, morning and evening

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: travelling interstate, staying in a hotel; supportive spouse is present and helping search for the medication

objective_data_offered.value: patient reports no aura and no muscle twitching or jerking right now, and says they feel at their normal baseline
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported over chat; no clinician neurological examination performed

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says the patient is alert, talking normally, and is not twitching, jerking, or losing awareness
spouse confirms the entire medication supply was left at home interstate and there is nothing in the luggage; they are in an unfamiliar area
